languages.text: "Картина ясна. Теперь предстоит разобраться с причиной случившегося".
"The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."
languages.original_text: "Картина ясна. Теперь предстоит разобраться с причиной случившегося".

traits.locale_text: "The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."
"The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."
"The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."
"The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."

languages.text: «Me ha quedado todo perfectamente claro. Ahora hemos de descubrir la causa de tales sucesos».
languages.original_text: "The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."

traits.locale_text: «Me ha quedado todo perfectamente claro. Ahora hemos de descubrir la causa de tales sucesos».

languages.text: “事情已经很清楚了。现在该查出这一切背后的原因了。”
languages.original_text: "The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."

traits.locale_text: “事情已经很清楚了。现在该查出这一切背后的原因了。”

languages.text: « Me voilà {mf|fixé|fixée}. Reste à découvrir ce qui a déclenché ces événements. »
languages.original_text: "The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."

traits.locale_text: « Me voilà {mf|fixé|fixée}. Reste à découvrir ce qui a déclenché ces événements. »

languages.text: "Tablo net. Şimdi bu olayların nedeni ortaya çıkarılmalı."
languages.original_text: "The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."

traits.locale_text: "Tablo net. Şimdi bu olayların nedeni ortaya çıkarılmalı."

languages.text: 「この事件の真相は明らかになった。この事件の真相を明らかにする必要がある。」
languages.original_text: "The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."

traits.locale_text: 「この事件の真相は明らかになった。この事件の真相を明らかにする必要がある。」

languages.text: "Das Bild ist klar. Jetzt müssen wir der Ursache dieser Ereignisse auf den Grund gehen."
languages.original_text: "The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."

traits.locale_text: "Das Bild ist klar. Jetzt müssen wir der Ursache dieser Ereignisse auf den Grund gehen."
